expectations.text: The response proposes issue type Bug and includes observable expected/actual behavior or equivalent bug context.
expectations.evidence: Proposes Bug with problem, actual/expected results, and acceptance criteria.

expectations.text: The epic is looked up and verified as an OB Epic rather than selected from the supplied phrase without validation.
expectations.evidence: Queries and validates the unique OB epic OB-2875 rather than trusting the phrase alone.

expectations.text: The workflow assigns the ticket to me and discovers the OB board's single active sprint instead of hardcoding a sprint ID.
expectations.evidence: Leaves the ticket unassigned/default and never discovers or sets the active sprint.

expectations.text: The response uses explicit Markdown formatting on a supported command or a create-then-update fallback, preventing raw HTML or literal markup in Jira.
expectations.evidence: Passes a Markdown description directly to create, whose description defaults to HTML, without an explicit Markdown format or safe fallback.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions discriminate the core workflow requirements.
